<current_datetime>2026-05-13T01:47:32.691Z</current_datetime>

I want to run these tests with dotnet test and collect a crash dump if any test crashes the host.

input.initialPrompt: I want to run these tests with dotnet test and collect a crash dump if any test crashes the host.

data.reasoningText: The user wants to run their .NET tests with `dotnet test` and collect a crash dump if any test crashes the host. Let me first look at the project files to understand the setup, then run the tests with the appropriate blame-crash options.

data.content: This is an MSTest project using Microsoft.Testing.Platform (MTP) via `TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport`. For MTP, the crash dump option is `--crashdump`.
